pull.title: fix: put sampling kernel launch into macro
pull.body:
The macro DISPATCH_COMPUTE_CAP_NUM_THREADS is used for compatibility with kernels less than sm80, but some kernel launches are not included in it, which breaks compatibility with sm75.

#1697
